SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.common.enums

Enum Class FaultDefault

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<FaultDefault>
com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultDefault
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<FaultDefault>, Constable
public enum FaultDefault extends Enum<FaultDefault>
Default parameter values for all fault-injection strategies.

Each constant encapsulates the out-of-the-box behaviour that a strategy falls back to when the caller does not supply an explicit configuration parameter.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    DELAYED_DECISION_MS
    Default delay before the Phase-2 broadcast in the DELAYED_DECISION strategy (3 000 ms).
    INTERMITTENT_CHANCE_PERCENT
    Default per-request failure probability for the INTERMITTENT strategy (50 %).
    NETWORK_DELAY_MS
    Default artificial delay applied by the NETWORK_DELAY strategy (1 000 ms).
    PARTIAL_SEND_COUNT
    Default number of participants that receive the Phase-2 decision in the PARTIAL_SEND strategy (1).
    TRANSIENT_DURATION_MS
    Default active window for the TRANSIENT strategy (2 000 ms).

  • Enum Constant Details

    • NETWORK_DELAY_MS

      public static final FaultDefault NETWORK_DELAY_MS
      Default artificial delay applied by the NETWORK_DELAY strategy (1 000 ms).

    • DELAYED_DECISION_MS

      public static final FaultDefault DELAYED_DECISION_MS
      Default delay before the Phase-2 broadcast in the DELAYED_DECISION strategy (3 000 ms).

    • PARTIAL_SEND_COUNT

      public static final FaultDefault PARTIAL_SEND_COUNT
      Default number of participants that receive the Phase-2 decision in the PARTIAL_SEND strategy (1).

    • INTERMITTENT_CHANCE_PERCENT

      public static final FaultDefault INTERMITTENT_CHANCE_PERCENT
      Default per-request failure probability for the INTERMITTENT strategy (50 %).

    • TRANSIENT_DURATION_MS

      public static final FaultDefault TRANSIENT_DURATION_MS
      Default active window for the TRANSIENT strategy (2 000 ms).

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static FaultDefault[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static FaultDefault valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getIntValue

      public int getIntValue()
      Returns the default value as an int, for use with APIs that require an integer (e.g. AtomicInteger).
      Returns:
      the default value cast to int.
